tasks.check: deno check src/mod.ts src/admin.ts src/admin/modules.ts src/admin/modules/audit.ts src/admin/modules/rbac.ts src/admin/modules/sessions.ts src/auth.ts src/drizzle.ts src/http/oak-api.ts src/openapi.ts
tasks.test:integration: sh -c 'files=$(find src -type f \( -name "*.integration.test.ts" -o -name "*.integration.test.tsx" \)); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No integration tests found"; else deno test -A --parallel --clean --ignore="_*/" --ignore="src/OLD-reference/" $files; fi'
tasks.test:integration:coverage: sh -c 'files=$(find src -type f \( -name "*.integration.test.ts" -o -name "*.integration.test.tsx" \)); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No integration tests found"; else deno test -A --parallel --clean --ignore="_*/" --ignore="src/OLD-reference/" $files --coverage=../../.coverage/sdk/integration; fi'
tasks.coverage: deno task test:unit:coverage && deno task test:integration:coverage && deno task coverage:report
tasks.coverage:report: sh -c 'inputs="../../.coverage/sdk/unit"; if [ -d ../../.coverage/sdk/integration ]; then inputs="$inputs ../../.coverage/sdk/integration"; fi; deno coverage $inputs'
tasks.coverage:detailed: sh -c 'inputs="../../.coverage/sdk/unit"; if [ -d ../../.coverage/sdk/integration ]; then inputs="$inputs ../../.coverage/sdk/integration"; fi; deno coverage $inputs --detailed'
tasks.coverage:lcov: sh -c 'inputs="../../.coverage/sdk/unit"; if [ -d ../../.coverage/sdk/integration ]; then inputs="$inputs ../../.coverage/sdk/integration"; fi; deno coverage $inputs --lcov --output=../../.coverage/sdk/lcov.info'
tasks.coverage:html: sh -c 'inputs="../../.coverage/sdk/unit"; if [ -d ../../.coverage/sdk/integration ]; then inputs="$inputs ../../.coverage/sdk/integration"; fi; deno coverage $inputs --html --output=../../.coverage/sdk/html'
